474.reason: [The <Stmt> component should be output BEFORE parsing the statement contents, not after. According to the problem description, non-terminal components (except <BlockItem>, <Decl>, <BType>) must be output on a new line BEFORE analyzing their internal syntax components.]

373.reason: [This method silently returns false when token doesn't match, but according to problem requirements, missing tokens like semicolon, parenthesis, or bracket should trigger specific error reports (i, j, k). Also, when a token is matched and consumed, its lexical information (category code and string form) must be output to the writer, but this method doesn't have access to the writer and doesn't output anything. This breaks the required output format for correct programs.]
